exdescription.message: Price comparison, product price history, and store promo codes. Smart shopping with BigGo Shopping Assistant.

COPIED_CHECKOUT.message: Copied. Please use it at checkout page
COPIED_CHECKOUT.description: Copied. Please use it at checkout page

idle_restart.message: You've completed the checkout! Please reactivate BigGo Shopping Assistant after every purchase made.

idle_may_not_track.message: BigGo cashback may not be tracked!

idle_cashback_reason.message: If your Cashback isn't tracked, it may be missing for the following reasons but not limited to: close the browser, open a tab that is not linked from BigGo, click on an advertisement banners or link, link to other shopping or comparison websites, install other shopping extension, or the session inactivity timeout is more than 30 minutes.

close_price_history_desc.message: You are not sign in BigGo Shopping Assistant yet!

close_price_history_tip.message: Are you sure to turn off price history popup?

coupon_popup_turnoff.message: Turn off coupon reminder function (Setting can be switched on/off)

coupon_popup_alert_desc.message: Are you sure to turn off coupon reminder popup?

privacy_title.message: Get the most out of BigGo Shopping Assistant

privacy_sub_title.message: To begin using BigGo Shopping Assistant, we need your permission to access the following information.

privacy_cookie_desc.message: BigGo uses cookies that helps us operate our services, analyze engagement and usage, and provide a relevant and personalized shopping experience.

privacy_user_interactions_desc.message: Anonymized data like IP addresses, date/time of use, and browser information helps ensure the BigGo Shopping Assistant functions accurately.

privacy_user_personal_data_desc.message: Personally identifiable information you optionally provide to us when you register for or use any BigGo services. This information may include your email address, username and password, bank information, phone number, whether you have a BigGo account, or other information that identifies you.

privacy_learn_about_more.message: To learn more about the data the extension collects and why, please read $word$

share_coupon_title.message: Help make BigGo better by adding a coupon, and also make other users save more.

share_coupon_code.message: We'll share your code with BigGo once our system reviews it.

privacy_access_permission.message: Access permission lets us personalize your experience

privacy_access_permission_desc.message: It is always been our mission to find you the best deals. We only collect data when you search or you are on the sites with shopping cart. That way, we can find you relevant coupons, rewards and continue to make shopping better for our users. The extension won’t work correctly without access to Cookies, and you will need to manually visit the BigGo website before starting each shopping trip.

permission_desc.message: To function properly, BigGo Shopping Assistant must have your permission to access and modify your data on extension.biggo.com sites. Allow and activate BigGo Shopping Assistant now!

login_hint.message: Successfully log in to BigGo Shopping Assistant
